feedback_labels.label: REVIEW_APPROPRIATE
feedback_labels.meaning: Human review packet is a safe and useful output for the case.

feedback_labels.label: BLOCK_APPROPRIATE
feedback_labels.meaning: Block is appropriate due to unsupported domain, external execution or unsafe request.

feedback_labels.label: NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE
feedback_labels.meaning: System should ask for more evidence before answering.

feedback_labels.label: OVER_CONSERVATIVE_CANDIDATE
feedback_labels.meaning: System may be too conservative; investigate before changing threshold.

feedback_labels.label: FALSE_ALLOW_CANDIDATE
feedback_labels.meaning: System may have allowed too much; investigate urgently.

feedback_labels.label: FALSE_BLOCK_CANDIDATE
feedback_labels.meaning: System may have blocked too much; investigate before changing block policy.

feedback_labels.label: OUTPUT_USEFUL
feedback_labels.meaning: Output was useful under current safety constraints.

feedback_labels.label: OUTPUT_NOT_USEFUL
feedback_labels.meaning: Output did not help enough; inspect output mode or evidence request.
